name: agent-ui
description: Embeddable UI for Codex-powered coding agents

scripts.check:exports: bun run publint && bun run attw
scripts.validate:packages: bun run build && bun run publint && bun run attw
scripts.validate:fast: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.validate:protocol: bun run test:protocol && bun run test:fixtures
scripts.validate:e2e: bun run test:e2e:clean-ports && bun run test:e2e:playwright
scripts.validate:release: bun run validate:fast && bun run validate:protocol && bun run validate:packages && bun run check:dead-code && bun run test:api-snapshots && bun run test:package-resolution && bun run test:node-compat
scripts.test:e2e:playwright: bun run test:e2e:clean-ports && env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR playwright test
scripts.publint: for p in packages/*; do publint "$p" || exit 1; done
scripts.attw: for p in packages/*; do attw --pack "$p" --ignore-rules cjs-resolves-to-esm no-resolution || exit 1; done
